Where do I buy mrdanga?

Sadhana · asked by user [] · 2008-11-03 · 4 answers
some of the usual sites are not selling anymore.
I have same questions as this Prabhu, unanswered yet_
http://www.pariprashnena.com/discussion/603/non-balarama-mrdangas-from-krishnacom-storeare-they-good/#Item_0
user [464] · 2009-11-02
I have found one on ebay.in but Im somewhat hesitant at getting it shipped halfway across the world.

http://cgi.ebay.in/KHOL-MRIDANGA-PLAYED-BY-KRISHNA-DEVOTEES-TABLA-SITAR_W0QQitemZ220397842319QQcmdZViewItemQQptZLH_DefaultDomain_203?hash=item3350bc2f8f
user [301] · 2009-11-03
Article below extract from following website :

chakra.org/announcements2/DevadsAug16_09.html

Only $180, excluding shipping! Its the latest price of our product to help devotees have a mrdanga at home.

Now with different pitch for the small head to choose from: High pitch, Medium pitch and Low pitch

Also, with five colors to choose from Blue (Nityananda), Yellow (Gauranga), Red (Varaha), Black (Syamasundara) and White (Balarama).

This sturdy fiberglass "Tilaka" brand mrdanga is made in the Philippines in the traditional style, but of modern elements constructed to withstand even the most exuberant playing. Heads can be tightened with hex screws (hex wrench included and attached with a pocket on the strap). Comes complete with durable strap, heads, and rubber bumper rings. Measures approximately 25 inches wide; small head is 3 inches and large head is 7 inches.

Shipping Method is either FedEx or Express Mail. (email me for the quotation of shipping price.)

for more information and orders you can email me at:

jaigopaldas108@gmail.com

user [154] · 2009-11-03
Wow. I quite like that tilaka mridanga. It is great devotees manufacture mrdangas without any animal products. We need to work on the quality of the plastic heads a bit.
